title: Abashiri bangaichi: Kôya no taiketsu
original_title: 網走番外地 荒野の対決
overview: A number of recently released prisoners become involved in a racket with a rancher who is a rival to a neighboring landowner and wants to use the convicts to seize his ranch. The rancher does not know, however, that he had years before killed the parents of one of their number.

trailers.title: 網走番外地　荒野の対決(予告編）

trailer_groups.title: 網走番外地　荒野の対決(予告編）

en.title: 網走番外地　荒野の対決(予告編）
